title: rubus hedycarpus var. virescens
intro: Rubus hedycarpus var. virescens, also known as the green-berried dewberry, is a variety of the dewberry plant that is native to the southeastern United States. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds that can help to soothe skin irritations and protect against cell damage. The health benefits of Rubus hedycarpus var. virescens include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support immune function. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or salve, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including skin issues, wounds, and digestive problems.
